speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Oh! Look who finally decided to show up. Ready for a fiery ride, [username]?

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Today, we’re making the mighty Schezwan Frankie Roll — spicy, bold, and definitely not for crybabies. Hope you're prepared!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Before you burn down the kitchen, let's check our ingredients first!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: And finally — roti roasting, assembling, and garnishes… but slow down, [username], we’ll get there!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Let’s start with the chili paste. Soak the red chillies in hot water till soft. Don’t pretend you forgot.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Blend the soaked chillies with garlic, ginger, salt, and a little water. Smooth paste, okay? No chunky disasters.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Heat oil and sauté the chili paste. Let it cook till fragrant — not burnt, [username]. Keep an eye on it.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Add vinegar, sugar, ketchup, and salt. Cook till thick.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Time for Frankie masala! Dry roast coriander seeds, cumin, peppercorns, cardamom, and cloves.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Grind them, then mix in turmeric, degi red chilli, dry mango powder, asafoetida, and garam masala. Perfect!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Let’s knead the dough. Flour, salt, vinegar, water. Oil it and rest it for 10 minutes.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Roll small rotis and half-cook them on a tawa.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Let’s make the Schezwan sauce! Cook the chutney with onions, capsicum, coriander, green chilli, and water.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: For the chicken filling, cook chicken strips in the sauce, onions, capsicum, coriander, salt, chilli oil.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Add cornstarch slurry to thicken. Don’t overdo it, [username], unless you like glue.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: For the aloo filling, repeat the same steps — but with potatoes. Even you can’t mess this one up.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Brush the rotis with oil and roast fully.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Let’s assemble the Aloo Schezwan Frankie!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Roti → Schezwan chutney → Aloo filling → Cheese → Coriander → Frankie masala.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: For Chicken Frankie: Crack eggs on tawa, place roti on top, add chutney, filling, masala, coriander, cheese.

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Roll them tight, [username]. Tighter. TIGHTER. Yes! That's a Frankie!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Look at that! Spicy, juicy, messy in all the right ways. You crushed it!

speaker: Nami
dialogue_text: Next time, don’t make me wait so long, okay?
